value.author: codex-sdk-cli-impl
value.text: Follow-up fix: Sentry gate reported one high handled CommandError, PM-CLI-19 (Validation failed: 1 structural error(s)). This matches the existing handled validation CommandError allowlist class, so the combined branch adds the exact one-error validation wording to scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs and covers it in tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts.

value.author: codex-active-pm-cycle-20260610
value.text: Active-cycle PR opened: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/pull/192 on branch feat/active-cycle-settings-reindex-telemetry-changelog. AI review loop executed across pushes; only unresolved merge blocker is literal all-src coverage gate.

patch.value: Docs gates validate links and anchors; onboarding verified from a clean install; daily auto-release and nightly matrices stay green for 30 consecutive days without manual intervention.

## Charter
Living capability epic for docs, onboarding, release, and CI health: docs/ tree accuracy, docs-skills-gate link validation, CHANGELOG generation (pm-changelog), daily date-based auto-release, CI Gates (static + coverage + windows-regression + nightly), and contributor onboarding.

## Scope
- In: docs freshness gates, changelog:pm:check drift gate, auto-release workflow (RELEASE_PAT, Sentry gate), nightly matrix failures, coverage gate (100% literal all-src per ADR pm-w13j).
- Out: telemetry/Sentry runtime behavior (pm-5oj5), code-quality ratchets (pm-92if).

## Standing invariants
- CHANGELOG is fully auto-generated from CLOSED items; regen is the LAST step of any change (updated_at bucketing trap).
- NEVER change package.json version manually; releases are date-based (2026.<month>.<day>) cut by the daily workflow.
- windows-regression job is the oracle for Windows path/shebang issues.

## Open children (2026-07-04)
- pm-7zs0 — recurring reminder: verify daily auto-release tagged AND advanced npm latest.
- pm-lt6n — GH-427 Windows Node 24 nightly: POSIX-only error-code assertions (in progress).
- pm-esbt — docs-skills-gate: validate anchor fragments in relative links.

value.author: codex-tracker-governance
value.text: CI and continuous-improvement planning review 2026-07-21: the quality surface is already decomposed across pm-qwoy security findings, pm-gnzh Scorecard, pm-vlnc DeepSource, pm-92if CodeFactor and maintainability ratchets, pm-0yi7 fuzzing or property testing, coverage and contract gates, release health, telemetry, and exact-head scanner workflows. Future gates should remain contract-generated, warning-free, reproducible on clean installs, mutation-aware, and ratcheted so baselines can only improve. Scanner findings stay individually triageable pm issues; broad CI umbrellas must not hide per-finding ownership.

value.author: codex-tracker-governance
value.text: Exact-head CI evidence after direct-main tracker publication: commit 669055d9757850cdb54da198ab18df75312192d4 produced 22 green or neutral checks and one failing Gates (compat) job (run 29846552505, job 88688713860). Local and clean-published-version reproduction traced the failure to compatibility-check seeding reading only item.id after pm-nilh intentionally promoted top-level compact mutation IDs. Canonical regression pm-pkdpyz now owns the parser, regression tests, clean compatibility proof, and exact-head green acceptance gate.
